theme.description: A calm, respectful, and grounded theme suitable for an app that manages silence in sacred or serious places. Avoids clinical tech colors in favor of warm, human-centric tones.

layout_and_spacing.rtl_guidelines: Use Tailwind logical properties exclusively: ps-*, pe-*, ms-*, me-*, text-start, text-end, rounded-s-*, border-s-* instead of pl-*, pr-*, etc. This ensures automatic flipping when HTML dir='rtl'.

BottomNav.style: fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/85 border-t border-[#2C3E50]/5 pb-safe pt-2 px-4 flex justify-around items-center h-20
BottomNav.interaction: Active state receives Terracotta (#E87A5D) color and slight upward translation.

FloatingActionButton.style: fixed bottom-28 end-6 z-50 w-14 h-14 bg-[#E87A5D] text-white rounded-full shadow-lg shadow-[#E87A5D]/30 flex items-center justify-center transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95

StatusPill.style: absolute top-6 start-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-40 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md px-6 py-3 rounded-full shadow-md shadow-black/5 flex items-center gap-3 whitespace-nowrap border border-black/5

MapHero.style: w-full h-[60vh] rounded-b-[2rem] overflow-hidden shadow-sm z-10 relative

PlaceCard.style: bg-white p-5 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-black/5 flex items-center gap-4 active:bg-gray-50 transition-colors

motion.page_transitions: Fade and slight slide up (using framer-motion).
motion.micro_interactions: Tap scaling (active:scale-95) on buttons and cards. Smooth color transitions on hover.

image_urls.description: A single dark stone rests on a sandy beach. Use this for the 'No places saved' empty state to evoke calm.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React with react-i18next for Arabic/English toggle.
Use standard Tailwind logical properties (ps, pe, ms, me, text-start, text-end).
Ensure HTML 'dir' attribute updates dynamically when language changes (rtl for Arabic, ltr for English).
Install leaflet and react-leaflet. The map should be the primary view (Home tab).
Create a mock GPS tracker using a simple interval that updates user location on the map to demonstrate entering/exiting a geofence.
When user location intersects a saved place's geofence circle, trigger a browser notification and update the StatusPill.
Use data-testid on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='add-place-fab', data-testid='bottom-nav-home').
Inject Google Fonts for 'Outfit' and 'Tajawal' in index.html or global css.
Implement Shadcn UI for the Add/Edit Place modal (Dialog) and Settings forms, styled softly to match the archetype.
